subject: math
activity_templates: A 1st-grade telling-time worksheet. 6 cute cartoon analog clocks, each showing the hour or half-hour; child writes the time underneath in digital form (e.g. '3:00', '4:30'). {{character}} points to the first clock.

A match-the-time worksheet. Left column: 5 analog clocks. Right column: 5 digital times jumbled. Child draws lines to match each clock with the right digital time. {{character}} stands between the columns.
A 'draw the hands' worksheet. Four blank clock faces; each labeled with a digital time (e.g. '2:00'). Child draws the hour and minute hands. {{character}} holds a big clock in the corner.

A daily-schedule time worksheet. Four cute cartoon daily activities (wake up, breakfast, school, play) each with an analog clock beside; child writes the matching time. {{character}} stars in the scene.
